iron_modified <- iron %>% tidyr::drop_na()
visdat::vis_dat(iron_modified, sort_type = TRUE)
iron_modified <- iron %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor)) %>% 
  relocate(where(is.factor))
glimpse(iron_modified)

title: ironman
text:
Data Dictionary
Quantitative Data

Bib (int): registration number of each runner used for identification
Division.Rank (int): Within the divisions, the place each runner has obtained over all races
Overall.Time (dbl): The total time it took to complete the Ironman in minutes
Overall.Rank (int): The runner’s finishing place for that particular triathlon
Swim.Time (dbl): The time in minutes it took to complete the swimming portion
Swim.Rank (int): The place the runner finished for the swim portion
Bike.Time (dbl): The time in minutes it took to complete the biking portion
Bike.Rank (int): The place the runner finished for the bike portion
Run.Time (dbl): The time in minutes it took to complete the running portion
Run.Rank (int): The place the runner finished for the running portion
Year (int): The year when the mentioned participant ran

Qualitative Data

Name (fct): The participant’s name
Country (fct): What country the participant is from
Gender (fct): The participant’s gender
Division (fct): The age range or membership a runner is in
Finish.Status (fct): States whether someone completed the Ironman successfully
Location (fct): Where the Ironman takes place

iron %>%
  gf_histogram(~ Overall.Time,
               fill = "cyan4",
               bins = 20) %>%
  gf_labs(title = "Ironman Completion Times",
          x = "Time (minutes)",
          y = "Number of People") %>%
  gf_theme()







iron %>%
  gf_histogram(~ Swim.Time,
               fill = "blue",
               bins = 20) %>%
  gf_labs(title = "Swim Completion Times",
          x = "Time (minutes)",
          y = "Number of People") %>%
  gf_theme()







iron %>%
  gf_histogram(~ Bike.Time,
               fill = "palevioletred",
               bins = 20) %>%
  gf_labs(title = "Bike Completion Times",
          x = "Time (minutes)",
          y = "Number of People") %>%
  gf_theme()







iron %>%
  gf_histogram(~ Run.Time,
               fill = "orange",
               bins = 20) %>%
  gf_labs(title = "Run Completion Times",
          x = "Time (minutes)",
          y = "Number of People") %>%
  gf_theme()









iron_modified %>%
gf_point(Overall.Time ~ Swim.Time, data = iron_modified, color = 'lightgreen', size = 2) %>%
  gf_smooth(color = 'black') %>% 
  gf_labs(title = "Overall Ironman Time vs Swim Time",
          x = "Swim Time (minutes)",
          y = "Overall Time (minutes)")

`geom_smooth()` using method = 'loess'








iron_modified %>%
gf_point(Overall.Time ~ Run.Time, data = iron_modified, color = 'lightblue', size = 2) %>%
  gf_smooth(color = 'black') %>% 
  gf_labs(title = "Overall Ironman Time vs Run Time",
          x = "Run Time (minutes)",
          y = "Overall Time (minutes)")

`geom_smooth()` using method = 'loess'








iron_modified %>%
gf_point(Overall.Time ~ Bike.Time, data = iron_modified, color = 'lightpink', size = 2) %>%
  gf_smooth(color = 'black') %>% 
  gf_labs(title = "Overall Ironman Time vs Bike Time",
          x = "Bike Time (minutes)",
          y = "Overall Time (minutes)")

`geom_smooth()` using method = 'loess'

          x = "Bike Time (minutes)",

          x = "Swim Time (minutes)",
          y = "Bike Time (minutes)")

`geom_smooth()` using method = 'loess'










bike_vs_overall_lm <- lm(Overall.Time ~ Bike.Time, data = iron_modified)
bike_vs_overall_lm


Call:
lm(formula = Overall.Time ~ Bike.Time, data = iron_modified)

Coefficients:
(Intercept)    Bike.Time  
     -2.757        2.006  

iron_modified %>%
  gf_point(Overall.Time ~ Bike.Time, color = 'maroon') %>%
  gf_lm(color = "black")%>%
  gf_labs(title = "Overall Time vs Bike Time",
          x = "Bike Time (minutes)",
          y = "Overall Time (minutes)")
